description:
The Maldives is a breathtaking tropical paradise known for its crystal-clear turquoise waters, white sandy beaches, and luxurious overwater villas. Spread across hundreds of tiny coral islands, this destination offers unmatched beauty, tranquility, and romance.

Each resort sits on its own private island, giving you complete peace and exclusivity. Enjoy swimming in vibrant lagoons, snorkeling above colorful coral reefs, and spotting marine life like manta rays and baby sharks. Couples can indulge in private beach dinners, sunset cruises, and spa retreats, making the Maldives one of the world’s top honeymoon destinations.

Adventure lovers can try scuba diving, jet skiing, parasailing, and underwater dining experiences. With its warm hospitality, magical views, and serene environment, the Maldives promises a once-in-a-lifetime escape into luxury, nature, and pure relaxation.
cost_includes:
Return Economy Airfare BOM-BOM 
Accommodation on FB basis 
Breakfast Lunch Dinner + Room 
Round trip airport transfer by Speed Boat  
Airport assistance on arrival and departure 
All applicable taxes and service charge for above services 
Welcome drinks on arrival. 
A Bottle of Water 500ml per person per day to be placed in the room.
cost_excludes:
Any meals other than those mentioned above included. 
Sport activities /Moterable activities  
Airfare 
GST 5% 
Any portage at airports and hotels, tips, insurance, wine, mineral water, telephone charges, and all items of personal nature. 
Any services not specifically mentioned in the inclusions. 
Expenses caused by factors beyond our control like rail and flight delays, roadblocks, vehicle mal-Functions, political disturbances etc.

faqs.title: 1. What is the best time to visit the Maldives?
faqs.content: The best time to visit is November to April, when the weather is sunny and perfect for beaches and water sports.

faqs.title: 2. Do I need a visa to visit the Maldives?
faqs.content: No prior visa is needed. All nationalities receive a 30-day Visa on Arrival.

faqs.title: 3. How do I reach my resort from the airport?
faqs.content: Transfers are arranged by the resort via speedboat, domestic flight, or seaplane, depending on the island’s location.

faqs.title: 4. Is the Maldives expensive?
faqs.content: It can be both budget-friendly (local island stays) and luxurious (private island resorts). Costs depend on your choice.

faqs.title: 5. What activities can I enjoy in the Maldives?
faqs.content: Snorkeling, scuba diving, dolphin cruises, island hopping, sandbank picnics, water sports, and romantic beach dinners.
